name: Black☆Star
description: A shadow weapon meister and the last survivor of the infamous Star Clan, taken into the DWMA and raised by [Sid Barrett](https://anilist.co/character/16582/Sid-Barrett). His weapon partner is [Tsubaki Nakatsukasa](https://anilist.co/character/8443/Tsubaki-Nakatsukasa). He is known as one of the toughest students in the academy, being quite self-centered with a desire to always be in the spotlight.
